creator: luciano@vespaperitivo.it
text:
When printing via cups to a postscript printer on a FreeBSD 12.4 amd64 machine it fails. The /var/log/cups/error.log says:

D [23/May/2023:14:15:26 +0200] [Job 567] backendWaitLoop(snmp_fd=5, addr=0x801dda148, side_cb=0x1028620)
D [23/May/2023:14:15:26 +0200] [Job 567] ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/libqpdf.so.29: Undefined symbol \"_ZTVSt18bad_variant_access\"
D [23/May/2023:14:15:26 +0200] [Job 567] PID 28159 (/usr/local/libexec/cups/backend/lpd) exited with no errors.
D [23/May/2023:14:15:26 +0200] [Job 567] PID 28158 (/usr/local/libexec/cups/filter/pdftops) stopped with status 1.
D [23/May/2023:14:15:26 +0200] [Job 567] Hint: Try setting the LogLevel to "debug" to find out more.
D [23/May/2023:14:15:26 +0200] [Job 567] PID 28157 (/usr/local/libexec/cups/filter/pdftopdf) stopped with status 1.
D [23/May/2023:14:15:26 +0200] [Job 567] Hint: Try setting the LogLevel to "debug" to find out more.
D [23/May/2023:14:15:26 +0200] [Job 567] ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/libqpdf.so.29: Undefined symbol \"_ZTVSt18bad_variant_access\"
D [23/May/2023:14:15:26 +0200] [Job 567] ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/libqpdf.so.29: Undefined symbol \"_ZTVSt18bad_variant_access\"
D [23/May/2023:14:15:26 +0200] [Job 567] PID 28156 (/usr/local/libexec/cups/filter/bannertopdf) stopped with status 1.
D [23/May/2023:14:15:26 +0200] [Job 567] Hint: Try setting the LogLevel to "debug" to find out more.
D [23/May/2023:14:15:26 +0200] [Job 567] End of messages
